name: @arkitect/desktop
description: Arkitect desktop wizard for repo diagnosis and MCP connection.
author: Arkitect

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "vite" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.js && cross-env ARKITECT_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca electron dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:installer: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build && pnpm run generate:integrity && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
